outcome: created P12 scaffold with state, logs, wiki, experiments, and paper directories
Progress and iteration_log reconciled with M1 close. 450-row manifest + frozen IDs + pre-registration doc + 9/9 unit tests all GREEN. validate_manifest.sh rc=0. Awaiting M2.

Framework scaffold minimum built (framework/{README,schemas/data-contracts+experiment-pitfalls,knowledge/auto-research-history}); M2 leaked-baseline runner + 3 unit tests in place; deep-run waits on DEEPSEEK_API_KEY in user env.
next: Wait for user to set DEEPSEEK_API_KEY then re-invoke experiments/run_leaked_baseline.py without --dry-run. Expected: ~15 min wall time, 450 records.

outcome: API key fix (PARATERA_API_KEY=.env alias), max_tokens 600->2048, parser upgraded, 27 leaked + 10 blind records assembled from partial runs. M4-M5b-M6 scripts written and ready. Mean delta on 10 paired inner_monologue samples = +0.180 (direction correct, n insufficient for verdict).
next: Decide between full 450 run (1.5-3h wall time) and 30-sample per condition directional probe (15-30 min wall time). User to choose API budget trade-off.

outcome: Ran 4 P12 runners in parallel (M2/M3/M5b/M4); ~6 minutes wall clock total; killed when rate-limit made parallel execution slower than serial. Partial data assembled: 27 leaked, 10 blind, 7 abstention, 3 neighborhood. Calibration metrics table built. Verdict is INCONCLUSIVE due to n<30 — calculator trigger on CI width is miscalibrated and flagged leakage_detected on noisy data.
next: DEFER M7/M8 until full 450 runs complete (overnight or scheduled). P12 viability verdict cannot be claimed with partial data. Scripts are ready: re-running is one line per protocol.

outcome: Pipeline complete: 5 runner scripts + assemble + calculator + paper outline + review_round_1.md all written and unit-tested. Partial data: 17 leaked (P12-011..027) + 10 blind (P12-001..010) + 7 abstention + 3 neighborhood. paired n=0. Honest verdict = data gap. M7/M8 deliverables authored with explicit inconclusive verdict; final go/no-go deferred to full 450 run.
next: Resume M2+M3 full 450 as overnight/scheduled task. Once paired n≥30, rerun calculator and re-score review_round_1.md with real 5-distinct-model personas.

outcome: Review run with 5 distinct models via PARATERA_API_KEY. Median=3.0 < 6.0 → fold_into_p1_p2. Reviewers R3+R4 noted opposite direction of leakage hypothesis (blind > leaked). P12 standalone paper CLOSED; carry methodology into P1+P2.
next: Migrate the 5-protocol design into papers/p1p2-evidence-ledger/. Do not re-open P12 standalone unless sample size > 30 per cell and verdict direction is re-confirmed.
